title: A Bayesian mixture modelling approach for spatial proteomics.
author: Crook OM Mulvey CM Kirk PDW Lilley KS Gatto L
content: S-EPMC6258510 PMC6258510 A Bayesian mixture modelling approach for spatial proteomics. Analysis of the spatial sub-cellular distribution of proteins is of vital importance to fully understand context specific protein function.
